reviews.review_msg: Interesting topics but hard to know what is expected on the exam, it's very hard to break away from the class average since most of the grading is related to group work. I suggest taking this class with another prof.
Couldnt concentrate on what he was saying because me and my friends were too busy fantasizing about him. Major oogle material. Course was interesting too but not nearly as pleasureable as him.
People on suicide watch should not take this course cause they'll be dead 2 weeks in.  Super nice guy but I'd rather do poetry than learn anthro... ok maybe it isn't that bad but close enough.
Richard is wonderfull and really cares about his students.  he takes the time!

Tom makes you stay on top off your readings. He provides a lot of readings that are quite interesting (No real textbook). His teaching is different than most, but it's refreshing. Marking was fair and courseload was light! You had to show up to class. I actually had a great experience with Tom.

By far the best teacher I have come across. It is such a pleasure to be in his class. He makes the environment extremely fun to learn in, and he truly cares about seeing everyone succeed! I would 100% recommend taking his class.

Took BUS 303 with Shafik this semester. Grading criteria is unclear. He is arrogant and egotistical and does not hide it one bit. He always drifts off to random subjects, which is useless for students. So many examples taught in class were no use for studying. People recommend Shafik, but take it with anyone else, it's not a hard subject.
There are easier professors for this class.. for the sake of yourself, avoid him.
